title: Robert's Building Pack PBR
description: A PBR texture pack made for Robert's Building Pack Mod.
body: This is a texture pack made for [Robert's Building Pack](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/17216.html) Mod，added **_PBR effect_** for blocks in this modpack,some of them have extra POM effect.Due to the mod is designed for Minecraft 1.20.1,you should install the modpack ahead and use this texture pack as an addition.
